prompt:
Use case: social ad shot 5 of 6
Primary request: FRA output proof: fire-risk workflow transitions from structured review to professional PDF and DOCX export cards, signaling audit-ready documentation.
Scene/background: document generation UI reveal
Subject: FRA review panel, export controls, finished document previews
Action: beat 1: review fields lock in; beat 2: export buttons activate; beat 3: PDF and DOCX cards slide into view
Camera: clean orbit then lock-off
Lighting/mood: crisp product lighting
Color palette: white, graphite, orange accent, blue accent
Style/format: enterprise trust signal
Text (verbatim): "Evidence-ready FRA outputs."
Constraints: all-ages safe, no real people, no logos, no copyrighted characters
